Title: Sign Up Process
Preconditions: User does not have an account.
Test Data: Valid email, password, and other required fields.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter valid credentials and submit the form.
3. Verify the account creation success message.
Expected Result: User account is created successfully, and the system redirects to the login page.

Title: Sign Up with Existing Email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter an email that already exists and submit the form.
3. Verify the error message indicating the email is already registered.
Expected Result: Account creation fails, and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid credentials and submit the form.
3. Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter incorrect credentials and submit the form.
3. Verify the error message indicating invalid credentials.
Expected Result: Login fails, and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Title: Geo Localization Success
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Trigger the geolocation function.
3. Verify the user's location is correctly identified.
Expected Result: User's location is accurately determined and displayed.

Title: Geo Localization Failure
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Provide invalid location coordinates.
3. Verify the system handles the failure gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for valid location data.

Title: Announcement Creation Success
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
3. Fill in all required fields and submit the form.
4. Verify the announcement is created successfully.
Expected Result: Announcement is created and displayed in the user's list.

Title: Announcement Creation with Missing Fields
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
3. Leave one or more required fields empty and submit the form.
4. Verify the system displays validation errors.
Expected Result: Announcement creation fails, and appropriate validation errors are shown.

Title: Announcement Filtering Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Apply valid filter criteria to the announcement list.
3. Verify the filtered results match the applied criteria.
Expected Result: Announcements are filtered correctly according to the provided criteria.

Title: Announcement Filtering with Invalid Criteria
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Apply invalid filter criteria to the announcement list.
3. Verify the system handles the invalid criteria gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for valid filter criteria.

Title: Announcement Acceptance Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Select an announcement to accept.
3. Confirm the acceptance action.
4. Verify the announcement status changes to accepted.
Expected Result: Announcement is accepted successfully, and its status is updated accordingly.

Title: Announcement Acceptance with Invalid Selection
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to accept an invalid announcement.
3. Verify the system handles the invalid selection gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for a valid announcement selection.

Title: Announcement Visualization Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Select an announcement to view.
3. Verify the announcement details are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: Announcement details are displayed accurately.

Title: Announcement Visualization with Invalid Selection
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to view an invalid announcement.
3. Verify the system handles the invalid selection gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for a valid announcement selection.

Title: Announcement Modification Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Select an announcement to modify.
3. Update the announcement details and save the changes.
4. Verify the announcement is modified successfully.
Expected Result: Announcement is updated with the new details.

Title: Announcement Modification with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to modify an announcement with invalid data.
3. Verify the system displays validation errors.
Expected Result: Announcement modification fails, and appropriate validation errors are shown.

Title: Announcement Deletion Success
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Select an announcement to delete.
3. Confirm the deletion action.
4. Verify the announcement is deleted successfully.
Expected Result: Announcement is deleted, and it is no longer visible in the list.

Title: Announcement Deletion with Invalid Selection
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to delete an invalid announcement.
3. Verify the system handles the invalid selection gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for a valid announcement selection.

Title: Profile Viewing Success
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the profile viewing page.
3. Verify the user's profile details are displayed correctly.
Expected Result: User's profile details are displayed accurately.

Title: Profile Viewing with Invalid User
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to view an invalid user profile.
3. Verify the system handles the invalid user gracefully.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the system prompts for a valid user profile.

Title: Account Modification Success
Test Data: Valid modifications to the user account.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the account modification page.
3. Update the account details and save the changes.
4. Verify the account is modified successfully.
Expected Result: User account is updated with the new details.

Title: Account Modification with Invalid Data
Test Data: Invalid modifications to the user account.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to modify the account with invalid data.
3. Verify the system displays validation errors.
Expected Result: Account modification fails, and appropriate validation errors are shown.

Title: Points Donation Success
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the points donation page.
3. Enter a valid donation amount and submit the form.
4. Verify the points are donated successfully.
Expected Result: Points are donated successfully, and the user's balance is updated.

Title: Points Donation with Insufficient Balance
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Attempt to donate an amount exceeding the available balance.
3. Verify the system displays an insufficient balance error.
Expected Result: Points donation fails, and an appropriate error message is displayed.

Title: Successful Logout
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the logout page or click the logout button.
3. Verify the user is logged out successfully.
Expected Result: User is logged out, and redirected to the login page.

Title: Logout with Unsaved Changes
Preconditions: User is logged in and has unsaved changes.
Test Data: Unsaved changes in the user account or announcement.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Make unsaved changes to the user account or announcement.
3. Navigate to the logout page or click the logout button.
4. Verify the system prompts to save changes before logging out.
Expected Result: User is prompted to save changes before being logged out.

Title: Navigation to Activities Section
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the activities section.
3. Verify the activities section is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: User is directed to the activities section.

Title: Navigation to Noticeboard Management
Preconditions: User is logged in and has announcements.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a user.
2. Navigate to the activities section.
3. Check for announcements.
4. If announcements exist, navigate to the noticeboard management page.
5. Verify the noticeboard management page is displayed correctly.
Expected Result: User is directed to the noticeboard management page if announcements exist.
